name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 12 Jul 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release note covers the eCommerce release "},{"text":"6.257.0","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Performance Enhancements for PayPal Checkout and PayPal Cards","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Several performance improvements were made to the order creation flow in both PayPal Checkout and PayPal Card methods. These enhancements enable PayPal methods to avoid discrepancies due to multiple cart sessions and pick the latest cart changes, for example, product price changes."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We also refactored the code to improve the overall performance and limit the error possibilities."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Suspended Account Login Screen Reflects Latest Contact Information","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The login screen for suspended and overdue accounts now shows the latest information to contact the Neto accounts team. For any billing and account-related queries, reach out to us at "},{"text":"billing@maropost.com","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SuspendedAccountEmail.0685g00000FT6oRAAT.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SuspendedAccountEmail.0685g00000FT6oRAAT.png","name":"SuspendedAccountEmail","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":775,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":" Fixes"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where the "},{"text":"GetItem","bold":true},{"text":" API was by default fetching the details for RestockWarningLevel, ReorderQty, and RestockQty fields. The issue has been fixed now and the field values are returned only if specified in the request."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with "},{"text":"UpdateOrder","bold":true},{"text":" API in which it was doubling the ship quantity and marking the order as Unpicked. Now, the issue has been fixed to fetch the correct item quantity to be shipped."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in which during the download of the Stock Valuation Report, the downloaded Excel file had a different number of records from what was displayed on the web page."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
